_comment: Canonical GalagAI game rules. Single source of truth for the browser runtime (js/galagai.js via js/game-spec.js) and the headless trainer (tools/train_static_pilot.py via tools/game_spec.py). An agent trained against the trainer is deployed into the runtime, so these MUST agree. tests/test_game_spec_contract.py pins all three copies to this file; do not edit the duplicates by hand.
_enemyShot_comment: speedPerWave is 0: enemy shot speed no longer ramps with the wave number. Difficulty comes only from the trained enemy generation driving the fleet, not from scripted per-wave buffs.
_fleet_comment: speedPerWave 0 plus constant columns/rows: the fleet never gets faster or larger with the wave number. perWave 0 holds columns at base (6); rows.max == rows.base holds rows at base (3) every wave.
_timing_comment: enemyThinkCooldown is the browser's enemy decision cadence; pinned to actionDt so the deployed policy decides on the same step it was trained at (snappier and consistent, no wave scaling).
_pressure_comment: Kill pressure: the whole live fleet is periodically shoved toward the bottom (aliens reaching the floor die) -- an escalating time limit that pressures the enemy to act. It ramps with time elapsed in the current wave (interval shrinks by intervalDecay each push down to minInterval; step grows by stepGrowth) and resets every wave. It is keyed to time-in-wave, NOT the wave number, so it adds no wave progression.
